overview: MultiGen Wellness is an endocrinology clinic providing hormone therapy for men and women, emphasizing comprehensive endocrine system treatment through testing and personalized protocols. They use subcutaneous injections and offer both in-person and online care.
highlights: Comprehensive hormone testing for 15+ hormones at outset
Subcutaneous injection protocol for testosterone therapy
Endocrinology-focused approach treating entire endocrine system
targetAudience: Individuals and families seeking long-term hormone optimization and proactive wellness support.
